intro.text: After received RMA Camera Unit, proceed the analysis as per below:

visual_check.text: Visual Check --> Unit received in good condition, no missing/burnt components
Visual Check --> Unit received in no under good condition, {remark_missing_burnt} missing/burnt

power_on_unit.text: Power ON the unit --> Unit able to power ON and successful communicate with PC
Power ON the unit --> Unit able to power ON, but unsuccessful communicate with PC

pcba_programming.text: Perform Firmware programing of PCBA --> Programing PASS
Perform Power Fixes programing of PCBA --> Programing PASS
Perform Power Fixes programing of PCBA --> Programing PASS

ecc_rework.text: EEC Rework - This unit had been reworked

ECC Rework - VOD electromigration fix  --> 
 - R89, R91, R97, R98 change to 10kohm resistor
 - R93, R95, R99, R100 change to 100kohm resistor
 - C112, C113, C114, C116 added 10nF capacitor
Since the +20V voltage become stable, the VOD current spike also is reduced.

ECC Rework - VOD electromigration fix  --> 
 - R89, R91, R97, R98 change to 10kohm resistor
 - R93, R95, R99, R100 change to 100kohm resistor
 - C112, C113, C114, C116 added 10nF capacitor
 - C60 change to 10nF capacitor
Since the +20V voltage become stable, the VOD current spike also is reduced.
ECC Rework- power cycle failure fix   --> 
 - C65, replace Zener diodes 
 - Scratch the trace and add on 4 resistor in Power IC 
 - R451 change to 4.64K ohm resistor
Since the 2V voltage, Power IC be more stable using power cycle.
ECC Rework- CDD image fix   --> \n - R487, R524 change to 7.5k ohm resistor \nTo provide more stable voltage to capture image.

good_camh.text: Since Camera head screening result is perfect, will proceed to HCTE test and checking the wafer trace got eletro migration\nHCTE Test --> PASS\nWafer trace checking --> No Bubble
Since Camera head screening result is perfect, will proceed to HCTE test and checking the wafer trace got eletro migration\nHCTE Test --> PASS\nWafer trace checking --> Got Bubble
Since Camera head screening result is perfect, will proceed to HCTE test and checking the wafer trace got eletro migration\nHCTE Test --> Fail\nWafer trace checking --> No Bubble
Since Camera head screening result is perfect, will proceed to HCTE test and checking the wafer trace got eletro migration\nHCTE Test --> Fail\nWafer trace checking --> Got Bubble

bad_camh_dvm.text: After verify, this Camh DVM result for {dvm_location} shown {dvm_result} short/malfunction cause it have {bad_camh_condition}. After repair, PASS
After verify, this Camh DVM result for {dvm_location} shown {dvm_result} short/malfunction and unable to repair it.

pcba_ats.text: Perform ATS of PCBA --> Measuring voltage and all testing was PASS
Perform ATS of PCBA --> Measuring voltage and all testing was fail and show {ats_fail_mode} fail.\n   --> After verify is {pcba_component_category} short/malfunction
Perform ATS of PCBA --> Measuring voltage and all testing was fail and show {ats_fail_mode} fail.\n   --> After verify, this unit unable to repair --> proceed replace new PCBA
Perform ATS of PCBA --> Measuring voltage and all testing was fail and show {ats_fail_mode} fail.\n   --> After verify, this unit unable to repair --> proceed to scrap

fa_camh.text:
1. Perform image functional test.
Result: Segment died/bad due to camera head part (CCD)

2. Check history of the lot during IQA inspection & camera head assembly.
Result: No any issue detected during IQA inspection on CCD and camera head assembly.

3. Perform electrical measurement and profiling trend on OS wirebond pad of affected segment
Result: Segment failure related to RST wirebond/busses

4. Perform optical inspection on affected segment focusing on characteristic wirebond damage matching
Result: Component and bond wire/pad are in good condition. Wirebond encapsulation is fully coated.

5. Verify wirebond condition by applying external force on coating glue.
Result: RST wirebond weaken compared to other wirebond

Root Cause Analysis:
1. Due to the segment of the camera died/bad.
2. Wirebond having weak contact on the PCB bond pad.
3. Wire bonding strength weaken under power up condition over time on wire bond with high electrical/frequency properties.
4. Unsuitable encapsulation material. Current encapsulation material purpose is only to protect wirebond from moisture/halogen element that can caused corrosion, not for holding (adhesion) the wire bond.

Based on the Failure Analysis and this CCD serial number is 89504-0004XXXX. So we suspect this CCD wafer trace have bubble since it is old CCD and new CCD that implement start by 89504-00085XXX.

1. On the bus trace at CCD shown a lot of bubble cause the trace unable to connect .
2.During the VDDF turn on, it caused the +20V voltage drop significantly as low as 16.9V.
This is due to the high load capacitance of the VDDF has drawn large current as the dv/dt is very high.
Instability of the +20V affect the U68 LDO operation which causes the current spike.

Based on the Failure Analysis and this CCD serial number is 89504-0004XXXX. So we suspect this CCD wafer trace have bubble since it is old CCD and new CCD that implement start by 89504-00085XXX.

1. Perform image functional test.
Result: Segment died/bad due to camera head part (CCD)

2.Perform optical inspection on affected segment focusing on characteristic wirebond damage matching
Result: Component and bond wire/pad are in good condition. Wirebond encapsulation is fully coated.

1. Perform FT on the defect unit
Result: Image turned dark due to camera head

2. Perform visual inspection on the camera CCD
Result: Nor abnormality found. Wire bond & wafer busses in good condition and coating coverage fulfill process requirement

3. Perform measurement on the CCD
Result: Abnormal voltage reading on the VCC and VDDR which related to voltage IC or wire bonding itself

4. Apply mechanical stress of related wire bond
Result: Wirebond have good bonding where wirebond break on the neck (not lifted from the base)

Based on above FA, highly suspected the image turned dark due to voltage supplied IC damaged.
This RMA unit was CCD {dvm_result} short cause {bad_camh_condition}.

1. Perform image functional test. 
Result: Segment died/bad due to camera head part (CCD) 
2. Visual inspect on the trace CCD 
Result: no bubble encounter, failure not related to electromigration 
3. Wirebond and visual inspect component CCD on the top layer. 
Result: did not observed any wire bond or any electronic components damage 
4. Perform ohming measuring on CCD by using DVM. 
Result: all measurement parameters within range

Based on the failure analysis above, this RMA unit high suspect the CCD sensor cause white segment.
This RMA unit will fail because of the Camera head is old Camera head after fix electromigration.

1. On the bus trace at CCD shown a lot of bubble cause the trace unable to connect .\n\nBased on the Failure Analysis and this CCD serial number is 89504-0004XXXX. So we suspect this CCD wafer trace have bubble since it is old CCD and new CCD that implement start by 89504-00085XXX.
This RMA unit was CCD {dvm_result} short cause {bad_camh_condition}.
This RMA unit was CCD {dvm_result} short cause {bad_camh_condition}.

fa_pcba.text: The RMA unit was no problem found and unable to duplicate customer failure --> All test was performed and the result was perfect.
This RMA unit was PCBA {remark_missing_burnt} Component knock off/burnt cause the PCBA malfunction.
This RMA unit was PCBA {component_cause_ats} Component short/malfunction cause {ats_fail_mode} Fail.
This RMA unit was PCBA high suspect is {pcba_scrap_why} cause {ats_fail_mode} Fail.

npf_summary.text: Based on failure analysis, the RMA unit is No Problem Found (NPF).

- R93, R95, R99, R100 change to 100kohm resistor --> 2220-0060 x4
- C112, C113, C114, C116 added 10nF capacitor --> 2230-0014 x4

- R89, R91, R97, R98 change to 10kohm resistor --> 2220-0057 x4
- R93, R95, R99, R100 change to 100kohm resistor --> 2220-0060 x4
- C112, C113, C114, C116 added 10nF capacitor --> 2230-0014 x4 
- C60  change to 10nF capacitor --> 2230-0185 x1
- C65,replace Zener diodes --> 2250-0057 x1
- Scratch the trace and add on 4 resistor in Power IC --> 2220-0399 x4
- R451 change to 4.64K ohm resistor -->        2220-0054 x1
- R487, R524 change to 7.5k ohm resistor --> 2220-0056 x2
ecc_rework.3.1G new Rework:

- R93, R95, R99, R100 change to 100kohm resistor --> 2220-0060 x4
- C112, C113, C114, C116 added 10nF capacitor --> 2230-0014 x4

texts.<=2 segment and 89504-0004:
1.Reduce speed of dispenser during wirebond encapsulation process to minimize any risk/stress on the wirebond
Result: Speed had been reduced from 4mm/sec to 1mm/sec.

2.Reduce pressure of ionizing blowing to minimize the pressure given to the wirebond during ionizing blowing
Result: Ionizing pressure had been reduced from 0.03 to 0.02mPa

3.  Improve encapsulation process by adding adhesion on the wirebond pad
Result: Adhesion process implemented on Jan'21 and start to ship on Feb'21

4. Electromigration fix implemented and ship on Jun'22 and and CCD S/ N start by 89504-00085XXX.
texts.<=2 segment and 89504-0004 to 89504-0008:
1. change the capacitor (C60) to 10uF (Part ID: 2230-0185)
2. change the resistors (R89, R91, R97, R98) to 10kohm (Part ID: 2220-0057)
3. change the resistors (R93, R95, R99, R100) to 100kohm (Part ID: 2220-0060)
4. add capacitors with 10nF (Part ID: 2230-0014) to empty footprint C112, C113, C114, C116
able to reduce the switching effect of the VDDF and VDDR to the +20V. Thus, improve the stability of +20V voltage and the current drawn by the CCD's VOD bus.

5. Electromigration fix implemented and ship on Jun'22 and and CCD S/ N start by 89504-00085XXX.
texts.HCTE Fail: 1. Using additional  HTCE measurement methods at Functional Test to filter those CCD fall below 0.9. Our main goal is  to improve CCD quality.
texts.Old CCD fail:
1. Will disassemble al the cover to check wafer trace if the CAMH is under good condition.
2. Using additional  HTCE measurement methods at Functional Test to filter those CCD fall below 0.9. Our main goal is  to improve CCD quality.
texts.Line Between Segment: 1. Collect data of IC damaged/degradation for within warranty unit and feedback to supplier and RnD team
texts.Whole Segment:
1. Implemented the CCD Capacitor (C443 and C444) to the high voltage rating at 17 Oct 2023 and the serial number start by  9704-0111769, 3.3G CAMH start by 89504-0008 9318

2. Proceed CD&A test aging test to 6 hour
3. Implemented the CCD Capacitor to the high voltage rating and reheat the capacitor before rework
4. capacitor pre-heating up to 150degC before mount/solder to the CCD + solder cleaning staging to allow CCD/cap back to normal temperature to minimize thermal shock impact start by 7 Dec 23
5. The CCD that implement and build by supplier 3.1G camera head S/N start by 89504-00089360, 3.3G camera head s/n by 89504-00133802 and camera card start by 9704-0113401(5 March 2024).
